roa.docketEntryComment: SFPD'S OPPOSITION TO DEFT'S MOT FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY FILED
PD MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY FILED

/CAL:MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/X:AMY SHEARER PRESENT ON BEHALF OF SFPD/CTORD:SFPD TO RELEASE CELL PHONE WITH BLACK CASE ASSOCIATED WITH SFPD NO,210-099-106 TO DEFENDANT TIMOTHY KNIGHT/X:ORDER TO RETURN PROPERTY SIGNEDAND FILED/

/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/X: AMY SHEARER APPEARS ON THEBEHALF OF THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT/CTORD:THE MOTION TO RETURN THE MONIES ($1,600,00)  SHALL BE RETURNED TO THE DEFENDANT TIMOTHY KNIGHT/CONTD: RETURN OF PROPERTY IN REGARDS TO CELL PHONE/

/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/X:AMY SHEARER APPEARS ON BEHALFOF THE SFPD/CTORD:THE DEFENSE SHALL PRODUCE PROOF OF DEFENDANT'S SALE OFHOME AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE/CTORD:THE SFPD SHALL PROVIDE THE COURT WITH THE STATE OF THE  INVESTIGATION INVOLVING THE REQUESTED CELL PHONE AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE/CTORD:SUBPOENAED RECORDS (BANK RECORDS) ARERELEASED TO THE DEFENSE/CONT/DAWF/

/CAL:MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/DAWT/X:AMY SHEARER PRESENT ON BEHALF OFSFPD/X:DEFENSE ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE IS GRANTED BY THE COURT/CTORD:DEFENSE FILING OF 05-27-21,INCIDENT REPORT AND CHRON REPORT TO BE FILED UNDERSEAL/CONT/DAWF/

/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/X THE CAUSE IS ORDERED TRANSFERRED FORTHWITH TOEPARTMENT 23 BEFORE  JUDGE BRADEN WOODS FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING,/DEF 170,6JUD:BRADEN WOODS/MO GRTD/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 04-05-21/DOP/X:COURT ORDERS THE FOLLOWING WITNESSES TO RETURN FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 04-05-21: MICHAEL MCDONALD;  TAKARA SHAW;  JASMINE NZUBA;  CURTIS MCFARLAND,/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:MOTION TO DETAIN FILED BY THE PEOPLE/TEXT:DEFT ENT NGPLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX:04-05-21 (30TH)/X:60TH DAY IS 04-20-21/987,2/NB/X:SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/SA5:SEAN CAROLLA/SAORD2/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
